summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Lexicon vocabulary builder app. All backend APIs working perfectly (9/9 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration tests successful - all major features verified including Word of the Day, quiz mode, progress tracking, and archive functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Word of the Day endpoint returning proper structure with pronunciation, definition, example
All words archive endpoint returning 30 vocabulary words
Progress tracking API working - streak, learned words, quiz stats
Mark word as learned functionality integrated properly
Quiz generation producing 5 questions with 4 multiple choice options each
Quiz submission and scoring system working correctly
Progress reset endpoint functioning for testing
Frontend Word of the Day display with all components (title, pronunciation, definition, example)
Mark as learned button functionality with UI state update
Tab navigation between Today, Quiz, Stats, Archive working smoothly
Quiz mode with complete flow - question display, option selection, scoring, completion screen
Progress/Stats page showing all metrics (streak, words learned, quizzes taken, correct answers)
Archive page with filter functionality (all/learned/unlearned) and 30 word cards
Theme toggle between light and dark mode working correctly
Complete quiz flow - 5 questions answered, scoring tracked, try again functionality
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all major features working)
